name: super-review-council
description: Heavy multi-agent review council workflow for Codex.

interface.displayName: Super Review Council / 超级审查会
interface.longDescription: Super Review Council is a heavy review workflow for Codex. It coordinates multiple AI reviewers through review, triage, fixing, verification, and repeat loops, with strict target freezing and drift checks.
defaultPrompt: 用 $super-review-council 跑一次超级审查会。
